scripts.build:runtime: cargo build --manifest-path ../../packages/runtime/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p src/game/wasm && cp ../../packages/runtime/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/webge_runtime.wasm src/game/wasm/webge_runtime.wasm
scripts.build:runtime:dev: cargo build --manifest-path ../../packages/runtime/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p src/game/wasm && cp ../../packages/runtime/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/webge_runtime.wasm src/game/wasm/webge_runtime.wasm
